macro.title: Fed keeps rates unchanged as inflation, geopolitical risks cloud outlook
macro.what: In a widely expected move, the Federal Reserve held its benchmark interest rate steady Wednesday at a target range of 3.5% to 3.75%, the same level it set in January.
